recommended.song_name: Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
Back for Good
By: G. Barlow

Capo: 1st fret (original key: F)


[Intro]

       [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
        I guess now it's time to give up[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
        I feel it's time[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Got a picture of you beside me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
        Got a lipstick mark still on[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
        your coffe cup[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
        Oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Got a fist of pure emotion[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
        Got a head of shattered dreams[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m/B[/ch]
        Gotta leave it, gotta leave it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
        now behind now[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
        didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]H[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
        for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]
        the song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back for good[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
        Unaware but figured I falled out[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
        The story , no , no[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
        It want good , no , no[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
        But in the corner of my mind I[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Celebrated glory[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
        But that was not to be[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
        In the twist of separation you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
        Excelled at being free[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
        Can't you find, can't you find a[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m/B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
        little room inside for me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
        didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]H[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
        for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]
        the song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back for good[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]       [ch]AM7[/ch]             [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]AM7[/ch]               [ch]E/G#[/ch]
        And we'll be together, this time is forever[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]E/G#[/ch]
        We'll be fighting and forever we will be[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]C#m/B[/ch]
        So complete in our love[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]AM7[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
        We will never be uncovered again[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
        didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]H[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
        for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]
        the song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back for good[/tab]
